title: How far death registration gets before medical cause is known
sourceIndicatorId: CRS 2023 death registration + MCCD 2023 medical certification

rows.interpretation: Estimated deaths used as the denominator for CRS death-registration level
Deaths registered in the Civil Registration System
Registered deaths that occurred in institutions
Registered deaths medically certified by cause under MCCD
Registered deaths where the deceased received no medical attention at death

metadata.crsPublisher: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, India (ORGI)
metadata.note: This is a counting-system funnel for scale and visibility. CRS registration, institutional death occurrence, medical attention at death, and MCCD cause certification are related but distinct measures.
